headlines.headline: NBA championship and Finals MVP odds: Timberwolves, Nuggets see odds take a hit
headlines.description: The Nuggets saw their odds lengthen after another loss over the weekend, and the Timberwolves took a plunge with injuries to Donte DiVincenzo and Anthony Edwards.
